name: Trinh Le
subtitle: Enterprise Integration | Architecture Strategy and Governance | Digital Transformation
certifications: Google Cloud Machine Learning and Big Data – 2019
interests: Travel • Photography • Gaming • Badminton • Road Trips • Cycling
profile: Integration Architect and Senior Solution Architect with extensive experience delivering enterprise integration and digital transformation across complex public-sector and commercial environments. Proven track record translating business strategy into secure, scalable, and reusable technology capabilities. Combines New Zealand public-sector architecture leadership with international experience delivering platforms and integrations for global organisations including Nestlé, Coca-Cola, and Unilever.
profileHighlights: Defines integration strategies, standards, reference architectures, governance frameworks, and reusable patterns
Specialist in API-first, event-driven, messaging, orchestration, microservices, and hybrid integration architectures
Deep experience across Azure Integration Services, Oracle Integration Cloud, AWS, ServiceNow, and Genesys Cloud
Strong architecture governance and stakeholder engagement capability, supporting strategic investment and technology decisions
Experienced in security-by-design, privacy-by-design, NZISM, New Zealand Privacy Act, GDPR, identity management, and secure system integration
Provides pragmatic architecture leadership across strategy, design, governance, and delivery

experience.title: Solution Architect – Integration
experience.desc: New Zealand's largest public housing provider
responsibilities: Define and lead integration architecture across major transformation initiatives, aligning domain direction with enterprise architecture, security expectations, organisational strategy, and long-term business needs

Architect an enterprise integration platform based on Azure Integration Services and Oracle Integration Cloud, connecting more than 12 core systems across tenancy, asset management, procurement, HR, finance, and data
Develop integration principles, standards, reference patterns, design guidance, and platform guardrails that promote reuse, consistency, interoperability, and scalability
Contribute integration-domain perspectives to target-state architectures, technology roadmaps, investment decisions, and architecture governance forums
Partner with senior stakeholders, product teams, security specialists, data teams, engineers, suppliers, and technology partners to translate business needs into practical integration solutions
Provide hands-on architectural direction to product-based and agile delivery teams throughout design, implementation, assurance, and operational transition
achievements: Provided integration architecture leadership for a NZ$100M+ technology modernisation programme spanning tenancy, procure-to-pay, HR, finance, asset delivery, and data and insights platforms
Led the introduction of automated workflows and intelligent orchestration within the MDS programme, reducing manual effort and improving operational efficiency across business and support teams
Established reusable integration patterns and governance practices that reduced point-to-point dependencies and improved solution consistency, maintainability, and scalability
Coached and mentored more than three integration engineers through design reviews, workshops, and hands-on guidance, strengthening domain maturity and enabling sustainable in-house platform ownership

experience.title: Solution Architect
experience.desc: New Zealand's largest public housing provider
responsibilities: Designed and governed cross-cloud and enterprise solutions spanning Azure, Oracle Cloud, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Genesys Cloud, and the NEC housing management platform
Translated business and programme objectives into solution architectures, options assessments, technical roadmaps, and delivery guidance
Provided architecture leadership across four cross-functional teams and contributed to governance, technical assurance, and complex cross-domain decision-making
achievements: Led the end-to-end architecture and migration of more than 500 contact-centre agents from on-premises Genesys Engage to Genesys Cloud, delivering a complex enterprise transformation within six months from programme initiation to go-live.
Delivered critical upgrades to the Actifio disaster-recovery platform and NEC housing management system with no unplanned disruption to more than 2,500 users
Delivered integration architecture for Te Mātāwai – Greys Avenue, enabling a 24/7 housing and support-service model for more than 200 residents

experience.title: Digital Solution Architect
experience.desc: New Zealand government agency responsible for nationwide health-promotion initiatives
responsibilities: Defined solution architectures and cloud-adoption approaches for national digital-health and public-engagement services
Led architecture across cloud migration, application modernisation, integration, data, automation, and digital-channel initiatives
Worked with programme leaders, health specialists, delivery partners, and technology vendors to translate public-health needs into secure, resilient, and accessible digital services
achievements: Led the migration of more than 20 legacy workloads to AWS, reducing monthly infrastructure costs by approximately 80% while improving performance, resilience, and scalability
Designed and deployed AI-powered conversational platforms using natural language processing and machine learning for mental-health support, handling more than 10,000 conversations per month
Helped enable nationwide digital-health services that improved access to mental-health information and support for more than 50,000 people across New Zealand
Received the Data Hackathon Aotearoa 2020 Award for developing a predictive analytics solution that forecast patient onboarding outcomes, enabling earlier intervention and improved service planning.

experience.title: Senior Technical Project Manager → Technical Director
responsibilities: Led the architecture and technical delivery of enterprise digital platforms, e-commerce solutions, system integrations, and customer-engagement experiences
Provided technical direction across application architecture, integration, cloud hosting, security, performance, and production operations
achievements: Owned end-to-end solution architecture for enterprise e-commerce platforms and SAP-integrated digital services supporting Nestlé Global and major consumer brands including Milo, Nescafé, and KitKat
Progressed from Senior Technical Project Manager to Technical Director in recognition of technical leadership, stakeholder management, and delivery performance

experience.title: IT Manager | Java Developer | Systems Administrator
achievements: Managed business applications, networks, end-user services, and IT infrastructure for a major English-language education provider operating across multiple campuses in Vietnam
Developed hands-on experience across software development, systems administration, networking, infrastructure, and production support, grounding later architecture decisions in operational reality
